title: eulophia leschenaultii
intro: Eulophia leschenaultii, also known as the 'White-flowered Eulophia', is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, Eulophia leschenaultii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its aerial parts are used to make herbal preparations.
